items.claim: Jose Delgado is 4 years older than Austin Bashi.
Jose Delgado has a 4-inch reach advantage over Austin Bashi.
items.quote: He's got a 4-inch reach advantage at 74 inches of reach.

items.claim: Jose Delgado is not yet ready for the top 15 of the featherweight division.
items.quote: I feel like Delgado showed in his last fight against Fili that he's not quite ready yet for the top 15.

items.claim: Austin Bashi has elite grappling skills.
items.quote: I think that his grappling is special

items.claim: Jose Delgado has been taken down eight times across his last three UFC fights.
items.quote: he's been taken down like eight times in three UFC fights.

items.claim: Jose Delgado's takedown defense is poor.
items.quote: Delgado's takedown defense is not very good

items.claim: Jose Delgado has improved his ability to get back to his feet after being taken down.
items.quote: his getup game is getting a lot better.

items.claim: Sha Quian Ko has shown significant improvement since his knockout loss to Sasha Palatnikov.
items.quote: I really do respect the improvements he's made in his game.

items.claim: Jean-Paul LeBosnoyani is a higher-level grappler than Sha Quian Ko's previous opponents, Oban Elliott and Phil Rowe.
items.quote: I feel like LeBosnoyani's a completely different level on the mat than both those guys.
